iti107:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti107:2.1:
“Monks, brahmans & householders are very helpful to you,
as they provide you with the requisites of robes, alms food, lodgings, & medical requisites for the sick.
iti107:2.3:
In this way the holy life is lived in mutual dependence,
for the purpose of crossing over the flood, for making a right end to stress.”
iti107:5.1: While in dependence on those well-gone,
iti107:5.4: of noble discernment, absorbed in jhāna.
iti107:6.2: the path leading to good destinations–
